question: The chart shows the company’s expense breakdown by category. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: Salaries is larger than the combined share of R&D and Utilities.
options.B: Rent and Utilities together make up a larger share than Salaries.
options.D: Salaries is the largest category by percentage.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Salaries: 35%; R&D: 25%; Utilities: 20%; Rent: 10%; Other: 10%.
